Unnamed: 4: Screen/Function Description
New users can register an account by providing their name, email, and password to access the platform.
Users enter a one-time code sent to their email to verify their identity during registration or password recovery.
Users can log in using registered credentials and log out to end their session.
Users can log in quickly using their existing Google account.
Users can request a password reset by entering their registered email to receive a reset link or OTP.
Users can change their account password by verifying the current one and setting a new one.
Users can view and update personal information, contact details, address, and profile photo (avatar).
Guests and customers can view the homepage to get an overview of the website services and features.
Guests and customers can view a list of all available motorcycles, including photos, rental prices, and basic information.
Guests and customers can view detailed information about a specific motorcycle, including images, specs, price, and included accessories.
Guests and customers can browse suggested tourism destinations with photos, descriptions, and reference links.
Guests and customers can read frequently asked questions and their answers to better understand the service.
Guests and customers can view the current rental price list for all motorcycle types and rental durations.
Guests and customers can read the platform rental terms and conditions before making a reservation.
Users can submit a contact form to send questions or requests to the support team.
Guests and customers can view current promotions, discount events, and upcoming campaigns.
Guests and customers can search and filter motorcycles by brand, category, travel purpose, displacement, or price range.
Guests and customers can enter their travel needs such as touring, city riding, or fuel saving to receive suitable motorcycle suggestions from the system.
Guests and customers can chat with the system chatbot to get information and rental recommendations from the website.
Customers can view a list of all past and current rental bookings and open any booking to see its full details.
Customers can select their preferred pickup and return dates and locations for the motorcycle rental.
Customers can browse and select an available motorcycle for their chosen rental period.
Customers can add optional accessories such as helmets or rain gear to their rental order.
Customers can review and confirm their personal details before proceeding with the booking.
Customers can review the complete booking summary including motorcycle, accessories, dates, and total cost before finalizing.
Customers can complete payment for their rental booking through available payment methods.
Customers can enter a voucher or promo code at checkout to receive a discount on their rental.
Customers can submit a cancellation request for an active booking and track the processing status.
Customers can request to extend their current rental period by selecting a new return date.
Customers can rate the motorcycle and overall service quality after completing a rental.
Customers can save motorcycles they are interested in to a personal favorites list for easy access when planning a rental.

Unnamed: 1: Get motorcycle suggestions by tourism location
Unnamed: 4: Customers can select a tourism destination to receive motorcycle recommendations suitable for that route or terrain.
Staff can view, search, and access detailed profiles of all registered customers.
Staff can deactivate a customer account that has violated the platform rules.
Staff can view a list of customers who have not returned their motorcycle by the agreed return date.
Staff can provide consultation to customers regarding motorcycle options, rental pricing, accessories, policies, and active promotions.
Staff can review and approve pending booking requests submitted by customers.
Staff can update the booking status through each rental stage: confirmed → picked up → active → completed.
Staff can cancel a booking on behalf of the customer, including providing a reason and processing any applicable refund.
Staff can view extension requests submitted by customers and approve or reject them after checking motorcycle availability.
Staff can view cancellation requests submitted by customers and approve or reject them.
Staff can add, update, delete motorcycles and manage their availability status (available, rented, under maintenance, decommissioned).
Staff can add new pricing entries, update existing rental rates, and remove outdated price records.
Staff can add new FAQ entries, update existing questions and answers, and remove FAQs that are no longer relevant.
Staff can add new tourism destinations with photos and descriptions, update existing ones, and remove outdated entries.
Staff can create new promotions or events with voucher codes, update active campaigns, and remove expired ones.
Staff can add new accessories, update stock and pricing information, and remove accessories that are no longer available.

Unnamed: 1: View customer feedback and contact requests
Unnamed: 4: Staff can view ratings and reviews from customers after completed rentals, and read contact form submissions sent by customers.
Staff can view the real-time GPS location of motorcycles currently being rented on an interactive map.
The manager can view, search, and access detailed profiles of all staff accounts along with their roles and permissions.
The manager can deactivate a staff account to revoke system access when needed.
The manager can assign or update roles and access permissions for staff members in the system.
The manager can view a dashboard showing key metrics such as active rentals, revenue, motorcycle availability, and booking statistics.
The manager can view reports on motorcycle rental performance, including most and least rented vehicles, demand trends, and discount recommendations.
